tasks.label: LaTeX: 完整编译 (MATH 2033)
tasks.command: cd "MATH 2033 Analysis" && xelatex -synctex=1 -interaction=nonstopmode -file-line-error -output-directory=build "HKUST AnalysisI (UG).tex" && biber build/"HKUST AnalysisI (UG)" && xelatex -synctex=1 -interaction=nonstopmode -file-line-error -output-directory=build "HKUST AnalysisI (UG).tex" && xelatex -synctex=1 -interaction=nonstopmode -file-line-error -output-directory=build "HKUST AnalysisI (UG).tex"

tasks.label: LaTeX: 完整编译 (MATH 3033)
